question_text:
Valid Parentheses

Given a string `s` containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the input string is valid.
input_format: Space-separated values as per problem arguments.
output_format: A single line representing the result.
explanation: We use a stack to keep track of opening brackets. When a closing bracket is encountered, it must match the top of the stack. O(N) time and O(N) space.
